title: Causal Analysis Path
description: Build fluency in Causal Analysis inside Statistical Methods by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Causal Graph
steps.summary: A graphical representation of causal relationships between variables. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Start after Graph. It opens into Causal Graph Neural Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Causal Inference
steps.summary: Causal Inference belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Start after Model Inference. It opens into Causal Inference Agent and Causal Inference in AI.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Causal Language Models
steps.summary: Causal Language Models belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Start after Language Models. It opens into Causal Language Modeling Techniques and Causal Language Loss.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Boosting for Causal Inference
steps.summary: Boosting for Causal Inference belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Start after Causal Inference and Model Inference. It opens into Gradient Boosting for Causal Inference.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Causal Discovery
steps.summary: Causal Discovery belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Compare it with Causal Discovery Systems and Cognitive Causal Discovery. It opens into Cognitive Causal Discovery and Causal Discovery Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Causal Models in AI
steps.summary: Causal Models in AI belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Start after AI in Architecture and AI and Architecture. It opens into Causal Inference in AI.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Neural Causal Models
steps.summary: Neural Causal Models belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Start after Neural Network and Neural Networks. It opens into Causal Graph Neural Networks.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Causal Inference in ML
steps.summary: Causal Inference in ML belongs to the Statistical Methods area of AI/ML, within Causal Analysis. It sits inside Statistical Methods / Causal Analysis. Start after Causal Inference and Model Inference.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
